message:
feat(testing): add test_guard logging to unit tests (bd-s3x9)

- Export init_global_test_logging from rch_common::testing
- Add ctor crate to workspace for future auto-init option
- Convert 34 tests in rchd/src/alerts.rs to use test_guard!()
- JSONL output now generated for unit tests with TEST START/PASS markers

Pattern for remaining tests:
  use rch_common::test_guard;
  let _guard = test_guard!();

Unblocks bd-3dqn (test telemetry dashboard)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
